title: Expecting the pagination bar on the GAMING PLATFORM overview page to have the necessary navigational elements
gherkin:
Given there are 205 "GAMING PLATFORM"s
When the user visits page 2 of the "GAMING PLATFORM" overview page
Then the pagination bar should contain a link to the previous page
And the pagination bar should contain a link to the next page
And the pagination bar should indicate that the user is currently on page 2
